intent: An audit that walks OWASP + STRIDE but earns trust by reporting only real, exploitable findings — and hard-gates a production-bound change on Critical/High.

dimensions.name: dual-lens
dimensions.criterion: Uses both the OWASP Top 10 and the STRIDE threat model.

dimensions.name: low-false-positive
dimensions.criterion: Every finding is a concrete exploitable path — a low-false-positive gate, not noise.

dimensions.name: severity-ranked
dimensions.criterion: Findings are ranked by severity with evidence.

dimensions.name: hard-gate
dimensions.criterion: Critical/High on a production-bound change is a hard gate before deploy.
